creator: maniactraq@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #2)
There's plenty of space on the device, 1.4TB to be exact.

And, if it's actually because it's not finding bin/llvm-gsymutil then how does one find it? The binary is not installed with devel/llvm at least as far as I can see. Shouldn't it be a build dependency and installed by default?
